title: Domestic Violence Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Domestic Violence Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Hispanic/Latino Community LGBTQ2+ Issues Mothers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONSEJO HISPANO MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A support group providing a safe space to talk with other women. Topics include healthy relationships and domestic violence. Zumba is offered with a certified instructor. Snacks, refreshments, and childcare are provided during the group. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female and their children Hours: Thursday 5:30pm-7:30pm Bob Chisholm Community Center 1225 Avenue A Seaside, OR 97138 Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO UNICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a crisis line for domestic violence and sexual assault. Also provides case management, survivor advocacy, housing help, support groups, parenting support, community education, and help with restraining and stalking orders. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latino domestic violence and sexual assault survivors Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours a day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 232-4448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSEJO HISPANO MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO UNICA
